About
YOUR CITY. YOUR TIME.

Real-time updates
for Dubai life

The most reliable source for UAE news, transport, services, and lifestyle guides. Stay connected to the pulse of the city.

Dubai Time: Your Premier Source for UAE Updates

Stay ahead with real-time news, essential services, and insider guides. Whether you're navigating the city's transport network, managing your finances, or looking for the latest lifestyle trends, Dubai Time provides the accurate information you need to thrive in the UAE.

Breaking News

Get immediate updates on national developments, policy changes, and community stories shaping Dubai's future.

Transport & Mobility

Real-time updates on Metro schedules, RTA bus routes, road closures, and the latest transit innovations in the city.

Finance & Banking

Expert guides on banking options, credit card requirements, and financial tips tailored for residents and expats alike.

Essential Services

Navigate healthcare, education, and government resources with our comprehensive how-to guides and directory.

Lifestyle & Culture

Discover the best dining, entertainment, and hidden gems that make Dubai a world-class destination for families.

Government Updates

Direct news from official sources regarding Visa rules, Emirates ID procedures, and major city announcements.
